Project 1.Title: AI Driven AutoML Pipeline
Project 1.Description: Engineered an systematized ML pipeline reducing model training time by 70%; evaluated 8+ algorithms with hyperparameter tuning using Python and Scikit-learn to select optimal models automatically.

Project 2.Title: Malicious DNS Traffic Detection using Deep Learning
Project 2.Description: Built a deep learning classification system achieving 94% accuracy in detecting malicious DNS traffic across 100,000+ records using feature engineering and cybersecurity techniques.

Project 3.Title: Python Data Ingestion and SQL Automation
Project 3.Description: mechanized end-to-end data ingestion and SQL schema creation, cutting manual database setup time by 80% and processing 20+ external data sources using Python ETL pipelines.

Project 4.Title: Obstacle Detection using Ultrasonic Sensor
Project 4.Description: Implemented a real-time obstacle detection system using Arduino and ultrasonic sensors with 98% detection accuracy within a 4-meter range for autonomous navigation applications.

Project 5.Title: Gas and Smoke Detection System with GSM Alerts
Project 5.Description: Constructed an IoT safety system detecting gas leaks and triggering SMS alerts via GSM within 3 seconds of threshold breach, covering 5 sensor zones using embedded systems.
